ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Anti-virus, API monitoring) */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the data source was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding data source */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event being monitored */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the event */,
  "last_occurred" TEXT /* The date and time when the event last occurred */,
  "severity" TEXT /* The severity level of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of metrics */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being monitored */,
  "completeness" INTEGER /* Completeness metric (0-100) */,
  "timeliness" INTEGER /* Timeliness metric (0-100) */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Availability metric (0-100) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Overall score based on performance metrics */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The date and time when the metrics were recorded */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* The IP address of the source where the metrics were collected */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* The IP address of the destination where the metrics were collected */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Status of the alert (resolved or unresolved) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* The severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* The date and time when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Detailed report data in text format */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* The type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric associated with the compliance check */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date when compliance was last checked */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who performed the compliance check */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
